name: Opening of the Spirit Gates
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>七</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>解</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>門</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Opening of the Seven Spirit Gates
desc: When this card is activated: Add 1 "Uria, Lord of Searing Flames", "Hamon, Lord of Striking Thunder", or "Raviel, Lord of Phantasms", OR 1 monster that mentions any of those cards, from your Deck to your hand. Once per turn: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 Fiend monster with 0 ATK/DEF from your GY. Once per turn, if you control a Level 10 monster: You can add 1 Continuous Spell from your GY to your hand. You can only activate 1 "Opening of the Spirit Gates" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: Add 1 "Uria, Lord of Searing Flames", "Hamon, Lord of Striking Thunder", or "Raviel, Lord of Phantasms", OR 1 monster that mentions any of those cards, from your Deck to your hand. Once per turn: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 Fiend monster with 0 ATK/DEF from your GY. Once per turn, if you control a Level 10 monster: You can add 1 Continuous Spell from your GY to your hand. You can only activate 1 "Opening of the Spirit Gates" per turn.
